meaning: n.(准备好演出的)节目,保留剧目,(计算机的)指令表,指令系统,<美>(某个人的)全部技能
examples: His repertoire encompassed everything from Bach to Schoenberg.
Meredith D'Ambrosio has thousands of songs in her repertoire.
Merely expanding the orchestra's repertoire will not be enough.
And there are noteworthy compositions on the programs that merit a place in the standard repertoire.
And yet despite the warnings and admonitions Lang is determined to expand his repertoire.
